skipRules: SKIP SELL signal when EMA Trend is 'bullish' regardless of RSI level
SKIP SELL signal when RSI is 41.0 to 41.5 AND EMA Trend is 'bullish'
SKIP SELL signal when RSI is 28.5 to 29.6 AND the trade results in a drawdown deeper than -1.90
SKIP SELL signal when RSI is 34.0 to 35.0 AND EMA Trend is 'bullish'
proceedRules: PROCEED with SELL signal when RSI is 35.0 to 40.0 AND EMA Trend is 'bearish'
PROCEED with SELL signal when RSI is below 30.0 AND EMA Trend is 'bearish' (provided RSI is not in the 28.5-29.6 danger zone)
corrections: Filter out all SELL signals occurring during bullish EMA Trend periods to improve win rate
Implement a RSI floor of 30.0 for SELL signals to avoid oversold-reversal losses
GBPUSD.summary: The strategy suffers from taking SELL signals during bullish EMA trends; filtering these out significantly improves performance.

skipRules: SKIP BUY signal when MACD Histogram value is below -0.001 AND RSI is below 50
USDJPY.summary: Filter out all BUY signals with weak MACD momentum.
